Welcome to the Student Affairs Section of IIT Jammu. The student affairs office is a one stop destination for all aspect of your journey as a student in this institute. Our Aim is to provide our students with a supportive and enriching environment at campus. We believe that a well-rounded student experience is critical to academic success and personal growth.

Student Affairs Office is dedicated to provide comprehensive support that cater to the diverse needs of our students. These support includes

A. Hostel: Campus Hostel life is one of the most important aspects of student life. The hostel experience is a great way to learn independence and self Sufficiency. The IIT Jammu has three hostel at main campus and Twos hostels at satellite campus. The hostel includes all basis amenities including the furniture, Water and 24*7 electricity

B. Mess: Health

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

### R. P. Prajapat

#### Assistant Registrar | **Student Affairs**

### Message

The Student Affairs Office at IIT Jammu is dedicated to fostering a vibrant and supportive campus environment that nurtures the holistic development of students. It oversees a wide range of student-related activities, including Hostel, Mess, Sports & Welfare services, extracurricular programs, and community engagement initiatives. The office serves as a bridge between students and the institute administration, ensuring that student voices are heard and their needs are met. By promoting a balanced and enriching student life, the Student Affairs Office plays a crucial role in shaping well-rounded individuals ready to excel both academically and personally. Through its initiatives, the Student Affairs office plays a crucial role in enriching the student experience at IIT Jammu.

The Student Affairs Office

# Hostel Infrastructure & Details
## Student Affairs, Indian Institute of Technology Jammu

**Tagline:** Everything Beyond Academics: Complete Student Life Cycle

---

# About IIT Jammu Hostels

IIT Jammu provides residential facilities designed to ensure a safe, comfortable, and student-friendly living environment. The hostel system supports academic success, personal well-being, and community engagement through modern infrastructure, dedicated support staff, and various residential amenities.

---

# Hostel Overview

## Total Hostel Capacity

| Hostel | Type | Rooms | Occupancy | Capacity |
|----------|---------|--------:|------------|---------:|
| ANZ | Boys | 23 | Triple | 67 |
| Braeg | Boys | 179 | Double | 358 |
| Canary | Boys | 56 | Double | 112 |
| Dedhar (West Wing) | Girls | 65 | Double | 130 |
| Fulgar | Boys | 662 | Single | 662 |
| Egret | Girls | 120 | Double | 240 |
| External Hostel | Boys | 49 | Double | 98 |

### Total Student Accommodation Capacity

**1667 students

### Overview

- Boys Hostel
- 49 Rooms
- Double Occupancy AC Rooms

### Administration

- Warden: Dr. Abhishek Kumar
- Caretaker: Mr. Anish Koul

### Capacity

- 98 Students

---

# Hostel Facilities

## Essential Utilities

### Power Supply

- 24×7 power backup available.

### Water Supply

- 24×7 hot water availability.
- 24×7 cold water availability.

### Internet Connectivity

- High-speed Wi-Fi available throughout hostel premises.
- 24×7 network access.

---

## Safety and Security

### Dedicated Support Staff

Each hostel is provided with:

- Caretakers
- Housekeeping Staff
- Security Personnel

### CCTV Surveillance

- Full CCTV coverage across hostel premises.
- Continuous monitoring for safety and security.

### Separate Residential Facilities

Dedicated hostels are provided separately for:

- Male students
- Female students

---

## Student Recreation and Community Spaces

Hostels provide:

### Common Facilities

- TV Room
- Common Room
- Indoor Games Area
- Student Interact

### Laundry Services

Laundry support facilities.

---

# Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

## Q1. Are boys allowed to enter girls' hostels and vice versa?

**Answer:** No. Cross-entry between boys' and girls' hostels is not permitted.

---

## Q2. Are there separate hostels for boys and girls?

**Answer:** Yes. Separate hostel facilities are provided for male and female students.

---

## Q3. What electrical appliances are allowed inside hostel rooms?

**Permitted Items:**

- Mobile chargers
- Laptop chargers
- Trimmer chargers

Only approved low-power personal electronic devices are permitted.

---

## Q4. Are tuck shops available on campus?

**Answer:** Yes.

Available services include:

- Grocery stores
- Hair salons
- Fruit and juice shops
- Fast food outlets
- Laundry services

---

## Q5. What is provided inside a hostel room?

Each room includes:

- Bed
- Study Table
- Chair
- Almirah
- Book Rack

### Additional Information

During student reporting periods, vendors may set up stalls on campus for purchasing:

- Mattresses
- Buckets
- Mugs
- Other hostel essentials

---

# Hostel Grievance Redressal Mechanism

IIT Jammu follows a structured grievance resolution process to ensure timely resolution of hostel-related concerns.

## Step 1

Complaint Registration

- Register complaint through the designated grievance portal or QR code.

---

## Step 2

Caretaker

The hostel caretaker serves as the first point of physical support and issue resolution.

---

## Step 3

Hostel Secretary

Issues unresolved at caretaker level may be escalated to the Hostel Secretary.

---

## Step 4

Warden

The Hostel Warden handles higher-level hostel administration matters.

---

## Step 5

Associate Dean (Hostel Affairs)

Further escalation is handled by the Associate Dean responsible for hostel affairs.

---

## Step 6

Dean (Student Affairs)

Final escalation authority for hostel-related grievances.

# Mess Infrastructure & Details
## Student Affairs, Indian Institute of Technology Jammu

**Tagline:** Everything Beyond Academics: Complete Student Life Cycle

---

# About IIT Jammu Mess System

The mess system at IIT Jammu is designed to provide students with nutritious, hygienic, and balanced meals while ensuring efficient operations, food safety, and a comfortable dining experience.

The institute maintains multiple dining facilities across the campus with modern infrastructure, digital systems, and quality monitoring mechanisms.

---

# Contents

1. Institutional Mess Overview
2. Mess Locations and Capacity
3. Features of Mess Facilities
4. Eat Right Campus Certification
5. Mess Menu System
6. Operational Timings
7. Feedback and Redressal System

---

# Institutional Mess Overview

## Total Mess Facilities

IIT Jammu operates the following mess facilities:

1. Anz Mess
2. Canary Mess
3. Dedhar Mess
4. Egret Mess
5. Annapurna Mess (2nd Floor)
6. Annapurna Mess (3rd Floor)

> Note:

### Daily Inspection System

Mess operations are monitored through:

- Daily inspections
- Institute Standard Operating Procedures (SoP)
- Food quality checks
- Hygiene audits

---

# Smart Mess Infrastructure

## Approved Food Products

Only:

- FSSAI-approved products
- Approved food brands

are permitted for use, subject to Mess Committee approval.

---

## Smart Entry System

The messes use:

- Digital access systems
- Seamless student entry mechanisms

---

## Biometric System

Mess operations include:

- Biometric attendance records
- Digital usage tracking
- Automated record maintenance

---

## Drinking Water Facilities

Available in mess premises:

- Hot water RO dispensers
- Cold water RO dispensers
- Purified drinking water

---

## Smart Display Boards

Digital display boards provide:

- Daily menu information
- Important announcements
- QR-code based feedback access
- Student notifications

---

## Mess Allocation Process

Mess allocation is carried out:

- Semester-wise
-

### Charge

₹69 per meal

---

# Leave Rebate Policy

Students can receive mess rebates for approved hostel leave.

## Conditions

- Apply through SARAL (EG)
- Submit leave request at least 72 hours before departure
- Leave must be approved

## Maximum Rebate

- Up to 15 rebate days per semester

---

# Eat Right Campus Certification

## National Recognition

The Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) awarded IIT Jammu the:

### 5-Star Eat Right Campus Certification

under the Government of India's:

### Eat Right India Initiative

---

## Coverage

The certification covers:

- All campus mess facilities
- Food safety systems
- Hygiene standards
- Nutritional quality
- Operational compliance

---

## Certification Cycles

IIT Jammu has received the certification consecutively for:

### Cycle 1

2023–2025

### Cycle 2

2026–2028

This demonstrates sustained commitment to:

- Food safety
- Hygiene
- Nutrition
- Quality assurance

---

# Mess Menu System

## Menu Design Prin

### Dinner

7:30 PM – 9:30 PM

---

# Feedback and Redressal System

Students can provide food-related feedback and complaints through:

- QR-code based feedback system
- Google Form complaint mechanism
- Mess administration channels
- Student representatives

The system is intended to ensure:

- Continuous improvement
- Prompt issue resolution
- Student participation in quality enhancement

---

# Mess Grievance Redressal Mechanism

Issues should be escalated sequentially.

## Level 1

Complaint Registration

- Submit grievance through QR code / online system

---

## Level 2

Assistant Operations Manager (Mess)

---

## Level 3

Mess Secretary

---

## Level 4

Mess Manager

---

## Level 5

Mess Warden

Applicable wardens for:

- Dedhar Mess
- Canary Mess
- Egret Mess

---

## Level 6

Associate Dean (Mess)

---

## Level 7

Dean (Student Affairs)

---

## Escalation Policy

Students should move to the next level only if the issue remains unresolved at the previous level.

---

# Sports Infrastructure & Details
## Student Affairs, Indian Institute of Technology Jammu

**Tagline:** Everything Beyond Academics: Complete Student Life Cycle

---

# About IIT Jammu Sports Culture

Sports and fitness are an integral part of campus life at IIT Jammu. The institute emphasizes holistic student development by balancing academic excellence with physical fitness, recreation, leadership, and teamwork.

## Objectives

- Promote physical fitness and mental well-being.
- Encourage active participation in sports and recreational activities.
- Provide opportunities for both beginners and experienced athletes.
- Foster leadership, discipline, resilience, confidence, and teamwork.
- Help students maintain a healthy academic-life balance.

---

# Importance of Sports in Student Life

Sports participation contributes to:

- Physical fitness and overall health.
- Mental well-being and stress management.
- Leadership development.
- Teamwork and collaboration.
- Discipline and time m

### Features

- Professional-quality snooker tables.
- Well-maintained playing area.
- Competitive and recreational usage.

---

# Gymnasium

Gym facilities are available in:

1. Chinar Sports Complex
2. Egret Hostel

### Features

- Modern fitness equipment.
- Strength-training infrastructure.
- Comprehensive fitness environment.
- Wellness-focused facilities.

---

# Pool, Foosball & Air Hockey

Recreational facilities are available for student engagement and relaxation.

### Available Games

- Pool
- Foosball
- Air Hockey

### Benefits

- Recreation and relaxation.
- Social interaction.
- Friendly competition.
- Community building.

---

# Chess Hall

IIT Jammu hosts a dedicated Chess Club and chess facility.

### Objectives

- Develop strategic thinking.
- Encourage intellectual competition.
- Support competitive chess participation.
- Foster analytical and decision-making skills.

---

# Outdoor Sports Facilities

The campus provides modern outdoor sports infrastructure.

## Avail

### Coaches

#### Sports-Specific Coaches

- Athletics Coach
- Badminton Coach
- Basketball Coach
- Cricket Coach
- Football Coach
- Table Tennis Coach
- Volleyball Coach
- Weightlifting Coach

---

# Additional Student Facilities

The sports section provides several supporting facilities.

## Facilities

- Annual Sports Awards
- Inter-IIT Medalists Felicitation
- Dedicated Locker Facilities
- Modern Changing Rooms
- 24×7 CCTV Surveillance
- Athlete-Centric Infrastructure

### Sports Environment

- Safe
- Secure
- Professional

---

# Intra-IIT Sports Events

## PAHAL
The Ultimate Welcome Sports Festival for Freshers.

## INTERGEN CUP
Tennis Ball Cricket Championship for Campus Generations.

## PADDLE POWER
Inter-Syndicate Pickleball Tournament.

## FUTSAL CUP
Fast-Paced Indoor Football Competition.

## PRAVAAH
Annual Intra-IIT Jammu Sports Extravaganza.

## CIRCLE CRICKET LEAGUE (CCL)
Swing Ball Cricket Championship.

## FREEDOM RUN
Celebrating Independence Through Fitness and Enduran

### Purpose

- Selection and qualification pathway for Inter-IIT Sports Meet.
- High-level competition among IITs.

---

# Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

## Q1. Can beginners participate in sports?

Yes. Students with all skill levels are encouraged to participate.

---

## Q2. Will sports affect academics?

No. Sports improve:

- Fitness
- Discipline
- Concentration
- Teamwork
- Time management

---

## Q3. Are coaching facilities available?

Yes. Professional coaching support is available for:

- Athletics
- Basketball
- Badminton
- Cricket
- Football
- Volleyball
- Table Tennis
- Weightlifting

---

## Q4. How can students join institute teams?

Through:

- Open trials
- Practice sessions
- Selection camps

---

## Q5. Are recreational sports allowed?

Yes. Recreational sports and fitness activities are open to all students.

---

## Q6. What are the benefits of sports participation?

Sports develop:

- Discipline
- Fitness
- Leadership
- Teamwork
- Confidence
- Fighting spirit

# Student Club Activities
## Indian Institute of Technology Jammu

**Tagline:** Everything Beyond Academics: Complete Student Life Cycle

### About IIT Jammu
Indian Institute of Technology Jammu is a leading Indian technology university that promotes transformative education and creates innovators and leaders at a global scale to address societal and industrial challenges.

**Address:**
IIT Jammu  
Jagti, NH-44, PO Nagrota  
Jammu – 181221, J&K, India

---

# Contents

1. Student Clubs
2. Annual Fest (Anhad)
3. Udyamitsav (Entrepreneurship Fest)
4. Inter-IIT Tech Meet
5. Inter-IIT Cultural Meet
6. Student Club Suggestions Flow
7. Other Events

---

# Student-Driven Club Culture

IIT Jammu promotes a vibrant student-driven ecosystem through various technical, cultural, creative, wellness, and community-focused clubs.

## Active Student Clubs

1. Coding Club
2. SAE Club
3. Robotics Club
4. Fintech / Popular Talk Club
5. Astronomy Club
6. Photography & Film Making Club
7. Literary Club
8.

### Objectives

- Showcase innovation and technical expertise of IIT Jammu students.
- Encourage:
  - Interdisciplinary collaboration
  - Teamwork
  - Leadership
- Promote participation in challenging technical competitions.
- Provide exposure to emerging technologies.
- Strengthen:
  - Technical culture
  - National presence of the institute

---

# INTER-IIT CULTURAL MEET

## Cultural Talent Showcase

The Inter-IIT Cultural Meet is a national platform celebrating creativity and artistic talent across IITs.

### Objectives

- Celebrate:
  - Music
  - Dance
  - Theatre
  - Fine Arts
  - Creative Expression
- Encourage students to:
  - Showcase talent
  - Collaborate with peers
  - Compete in cultural events
- Foster:
  - Creativity
  - Camaraderie
  - Cultural exchange among IITs

---

# Student-Led Activities & Initiatives

IIT Jammu students organize numerous activities throughout the year.

## Technical Activities

- Dat-a-Thon
- RoboSoccer
- Game Development Workshop
- Deep Learnin

### Escalation Guideline

Start from Level 1 and escalate only if the issue remains unresolved.

This process ensures smooth communication and efficient resolution of student concerns related to club activities.

---

# Other Institute Events

Apart from club-driven activities, IIT Jammu also organizes various institute-wide events.

## Events

- National Unity Day: Tribal Cuisine Unity Carnival
- Viksit Bharat – Yuva Connect Program
- Fitness Ki Dose – Aadha Ghanta Roz (Yoga)
- Sunday on Cycle
- National Voter's Day

---

# Student Life Philosophy

**Learn. Engage. Invent. Create Impact.**

IIT Jammu encourages students to actively participate in academic, technical, cultural, entrepreneurial, wellness, and community activities, fostering holistic development beyond classroom learning.

---

# Page Title: IIT Jammu SW - Student Welfare

### About Us

Welcome to the Student Affairs Section of IIT Jammu. The student affairs office is a one stop destination for all aspect of your journey as a student in this institute. Our Aim is to provide our students with a supportive and enriching environment at campus. We believe that a well-rounded student experience is critical to academic success and personal growth.

### Message

The Student Affairs Office at the Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) serves as the central hub for all aspects of student life, dedicated to ensuring a comprehensive and enriching experience for our students. We are committed to fostering a supportive environment that is integral to both academic excellence and personal development. The IIT Jammu campus provides an ideal setting for students to engage in a wide range of recreational and extracurricular activities, with a strong emphasis on cultivating these interests from the onset of their und
